rationale: [survived critique] Root cause of the 0 is a missing/broken solution.py, so the first, highest-value step is to guarantee a passing baseline solution exists before any tuning. Then I tighten the int4 dequant-GEMV fusion guidance so the optimization actually reduces the weight byte-stream at batch-1 decode.

[survived critique] A speedup below 1 means the fused kernel is under-parallelized, not just launch-bound. I add guidance to use a persistent one-grid megakernel that fills all SMs and sequences layer stages via a grid-wide barrier, plus a tip to check SM occupancy, and remind in the prompt to confirm speedup>1 before tuning micro-details.
